form.formComment: Fair performance when beaten by 4 m finishing third after showing early speed, behind Oh Miki at this track over 2185m in a 4yo+ NR 55 to 65 on February 2 at $20. Then a handy effort when beaten by 4.5 m finishing second after showing early speed, behind Chasing Rex at Gloucester Park over 2130m in a 4yo+ NR up to 79 on March 20 at $5.50. Should be involved on her recent form.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced roughly after the start was effected and tightened shortly after.
Broke gait during the score up and out of position as the start was effected.

form.formComment: Improved last start with a game effort when 3rd (Fr2) over 1177m after showing early pace at this track, beaten 4.5 m by Swanbourne Spunk (1:22.40) in NR up to 55 on March 30 at $4.80. Decent effort last start. One of the key runners.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced keenly during the early and middle stages.

form.formComment: Lacklustre performance first-up beaten 55 m ninth behind Island Tee Rex at Bunbury over 2100m in a 4yo+ NR up to 55 on March 28. Drawn favourably and is worth another chance.

form.formComment: In good form recently. Last start won by 6 m as favourite (Fr8) at Gloucester Park (2:35.50) beating Gelsomino Amal in 4yo+ NR 60 to 68 on March 31 at $2.40. Hard to beat again.

form.formComment: Last start by 5 m after showing early speed, (Fr3) at Gloucester Park (2:35.10) beating Rox The World in 4yo+ 0W/17K stake on April 3 at $4.80. Major contender on current form.

form.formComment: Didn't do much last start, was well back in the run when 6th (Fr5) over 2180m at Wagin beaten 30 m by Money Well Spent (2:45.00) in 4yo+ 2-4 WINs on April 2 at $23. Before that 5th (Fr5) over 2180m after showing early pace at Wagin beaten 7 m by Satan Princess (2:46.20) in 4yo+ NR up to 49 on March 27 at $13. This looks far too tough.

form.formComment: Didn't do much last start, was well back in the run when 7th (Fr7) over 1730m at Gloucester Park, beaten 8 m by Salsawithsierra (2:05.50) in 4yo+ NR 49 to 55 on March 31 at $21. Before that was driven from back in the field when 7th (Fr5) over 2185m at this track beaten 45 m by Captain Stirling (2:39.80) in 4yo+ 2-4 WINs on March 23 at $41. Others make more appeal.

form.formComment: Last start 6th (Sr1) over 1177m at this track, beaten 10 m by Akabah (1:23.10) in NR up to 55 on March 30 at $4.60. Two runs back 6th (Sr1) over 2180m at Wagin, beaten 25 m by Beyond Bling (2:45.20) in 4yo+ NR up to 59 on March 27 at $5. Unlikely to threaten.
